resources.string: This post was hidden because it mentions your hidden users or words
Post was muted or reported by
Event is loading or can\'t be found in your relay list
The number of spamming events coming from this relay
You are using a public key and public keys are read-only. Login with a Private key to be able to reply
You are using a public key and public keys are read-only. Login with a Private key to be able to boost posts
You are using a public key and public keys are read-only. Login with a Private key to like posts
No Zap Amount Setup. Long Press to change
You are using a public key and public keys are read-only. Login with a Private key to be able to send zaps
You are using a public key and public keys are read-only. Login with a Private key to be able to follow
You are using a public key and public keys are read-only. Login with a Private key to be able to unfollow
You are using a public key and public keys are read-only. Login with a Private key to be able to hide a word or sentence
You are using a public key and public keys are read-only. Login with a Private key to be able to show a word or sentence
You are using a public key and public keys are read-only. Login with a Private key to be able to change settings
You are using a public key and public keys are read-only. Login with a Private key to be able to upload
You are using a public key and public keys are read-only. Login with a Private key to be able to sign for events
The signer did not authorize a decryption that is required to make this operation. Activate NIP-44 decryptions in your signer app and try again
Was the Signer app uninstalled? Check if the signer is installed and has this account. Log off and Log in again of the signer app has changed.
External signer returned a payload that is strange for the request. There might be a bug on either Amethyst or the Signer.
Add an emoji with hidden message to post
Percentage of successful connections to the relay
The number of connection errors in this session
Image saved to the phone\'s photo gallery
Video saved to the phone\'s video gallery
Click and hold to record a message
NIP-95 is not supported for voice messages yet
Alters your voice pitch. Note: basic pitch changes can potentially be reversed by determined listeners.
User does not have a lightning address set up to receive sats
Copies the Note ID to the clipboard for sharing in Nostr
Copy Channel ID (Note) to the Clipboard
Copies the Nsec ID (your password) to the clipboard for backup
Copy Secret Key to the Clipboard
Show encrypted private key QR code
Copies the public key to the clipboard for sharing
Copy Public Key (NPub) to the Clipboard

Relay chats are chat groups controlled by their home relay. They are visible to everyone on Nostr and anyone can participate on them. They are great for open communities around specific topics. Some of these groups are ephemeral and thus chat messages disappear over time

Public chats are visible to everyone on Nostr and anyone can participate on them. They are great for open communities around specific topics. Moderation can be controlled by deleting posts on its relays
Insert between 1–3 relays that host this group. Nostr clients use this setting to know where to download messages from and send your messages to.

## Key Backup and Safety Tips 

Your account is secured by a secret key. The key is a long sequence of characters starting with **nsec1**. Anyone who has access to this secret key can post and change your identity. 

- Do **not** put your secret key in any website or software you do not trust. 
- Amethyst developers will **never** ask for your secret key. 
- **Do** keep a secure backup of your secret key for account recovery. We recommend using a password manager.

For additional security, you can encrypt your key with a password. This key starts with **ncryptsec1** and cannot be used without your password. \n\nIf you lose your password, you will not be able to recover your key.
Failed to encrypt your private key
Encrypt and copy my secret key
Biometrics failed to authenticate the owner of this phone
Biometrics failed to authenticate the owner of this phone. Error: %1$s
You Received a new Badge Award
"<Unable to decrypt private message>\n\nYou were cited in a private/encrypted conversation between %1$s and %2$s."
Remove this media from your Gallery.

Amethyst will request that your note be deleted from the relays you are currently connected to. There is no guarantee that your note will be permanently deleted from those relays, or from other relays where it may be stored.
Blocking a user will hide their content in your app. Your notes are still publicly viewable, including to people you block. Blocked users are listed on the Security Filters screen.
All reports posted will be publicly visible.
Optionally provide additional context about your report…
Tap to pick a photo — it will be uploaded to your media server.
Moderators can approve posts. You are always a moderator.
Pick relays that will host requests, approvals, or the community author\'s metadata.
Pick a square image to be the face of your badge.
Choose which of the badges you\'ve received appear on your profile.
You haven\'t received any badges yet.
%1$d item(s) in this list have been deleted by their author.
You do not have any bookmark lists yet. Tap the new button below to make one.
You do not have any interest sets yet. Tap the new button below to make one.
Bookmark lists metadata can be seen by anyone on Nostr. Only your private members are encrypted.
Authorizes Amethyst to pay zaps without leaving the app. Keep the secret safe.
Shown when pressing the zap button. Tap an amount to remove it. If you leave it empty, it will open the dialog to insert an amount every time.
Controls how your identity is shown when you send a zap.
Poll is closed to new votes
Only one vote per user is allowed on this type of poll
Thank you for all your work!
Poll authors can\'t vote in their own polls.
This content is the same since the post
This content has changed. The author might not have seen or approved the change
A blue boat in a white sandy beach at sunset
Everybody can see the transaction and message
Sender and Receiver can see each other and read the message
Receiver and the public does not know who sent the payment
No trace in Nostr, only in Lightning
Post as a new throwaway identity. Your account will not be linked to this reply.
This reply will be posted from a new anonymous identity
Choose a server to upload this file to
Set your preferred media upload servers.
You have no NIP-96 servers set. You can use Amethyst\'s list, or add one below ↓
You have no Blossom servers set. You can use Amethyst\'s list, or add one below ↓
Amethyst\'s default list. You can add them individually or add the list.
Publish your payment addresses so others can send you funds directly.
Add payment addresses for different networks (e.g. bitcoin, lightning, ethereum).
No payment targets set. Add one below ↓
No app found to handle this payment. Please install a compatible wallet.
Files are hosted by your relays. New NIP: check if they support
Your data will be immediately transferred in the regular network
These are follow lists designed for your own usage. You can follow users privately or publicly
It seems you do not have any follow sets yet. \nTap below to refresh, or tap the add buttons to create a new one.
Add or remove user from lists, or create a new list with this user.
No follow lists were found, or you don\'t have any follow lists. Tap below to refresh, or use the menu to create one.
There was a problem while fetching: %1$s
Creates a new follow set, and adds %1$s as a %2$s member.
This list doesn\'t have a description
Set a new name/description for the cloned list below.

## Connect through Tor with Orbot 

1. Install [Orbot](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=org.torproject.android) 
2. Start Orbot 
3. In Orbot, check the Socks port. The default uses 9050 
4. If necessary change the port in Orbot 
5. Configure the Socks port in this screen 
6. Press the Activate button to use Orbot as a proxy
Use the internal version or Orbot
Force Tor to send and receive DMs
Force Tor on all relays in your lists
Force Tor when loading profile pictures
Force Tor when loading url previews
Force Tor on zaps, lightning and cashu transfers
Force Tor when verifying NIP-05 addresses
Use Tor when it\'s required by the server
Hide your IP from random relays
Hide your IP from everything, but images and videos
Hide your IP in all connections
Notifies you when a private message arrives
Notifies you when somebody zaps you
Notifies you when somebody reacts to your post
Notifies you about chess game events
Notifications for incoming voice and video calls
When disabled, call buttons are hidden from chat screens and all incoming calls are silently ignored.
Default STUN and TURN servers are always included. Add custom TURN servers for restrictive networks.
Keeps connections to your inbox relays active for real-time notifications
Keeps a persistent connection to your inbox relays for instant notification delivery. Shows an ongoing notification. Uses more battery but ensures you never miss a message.
Android may restrict relay connections in the background. Disable battery optimization for Amethyst to ensure reliable notifications.
This post contains sensitive content which some people may find offensive or disturbing
Warn when posts have reports from your follows
Hides posts from strangers that were exactly the same for 5 or more times
Shows a warning message when posts have 5 or more reports from your follows
Shows a warning message when the author of the post marked it as sensitive
Hides posts with more hashtags than this limit. Set to 0 to disable
No reaction types pre-selected for this user. Long press on the heart button to change
Adds a target amount of sats to raise for this post. Supporting clients may show this as a progress bar to incentivize donations
The amount in bytes that was sent to this relay, including filters and events
The amount in bytes that was received from this relay, including filters and events
An error occurred trying to get relay information from %1$s
Errors and Notices from this Relay
No active subscriptions for this relay
Logging out deletes all your local information. Make sure to have your private keys backed up to avoid losing your account. Do you want to continue?
These are lists of users that you recommend to other people. Only public users are allowed.
This group does not have a description or rules. Talk to the owner to add one
This community does not have a description. Talk to the owner to add one
Adds sensitive content warning before showing this content
Supporting clients will forward zaps to the LNAddress or User Profile below instead of yours
Adds a Geohash of your location to the post. The public will know you are within 5km (3mi) of the current location
Only followers of the location will see it. Your general followers won\'t see it.
Only followers of the hashtag will see it. Your general followers won\'t see it.
Adds sensitive content warning before showing your content. This is ideal for any NSFW content or content some people may find offensive or disturbing

Activating this mode requires Amethyst to send a NIP-17 message (GiftWrapped, Sealed Direct and Group Messages). NIP-17 is new and most clients have not implemented it yet. Make sure the receiver is using a compatible client.
Insert the destination of the message first
Changing the name for the new goals.
The URI %1$s is not a valid NIP-47 login URI.

Amethyst couldn't find any wallet apps that support Nostr Wallet Connect (NWC). 

What you can do: 
	1. Verify NWC Support: Double-check that your preferred wallet app is compatible with Nostr Wallet Connect. 
	2. Create Connection: Go to your wallet app and create a new NWC connection. 
	3. Link to Amethyst: Your wallet will usually give you three options: 
		3.1 Automatic Link: A button to automatically open and connect to Amethyst. If so, click that button, open Amethyst and hit save on the new screen. 
		3.2 Manual Link: A Connection URI you can copy and click the paste icon on this screen to directly input it. 
		3.3 QR Code: The wallet creates a QR code which you can read from the QR code button in this screen.
Automatically play videos when visible on screen
Media added to your Profile Gallery

Votes are weighted by the zap amount. You can set a minimum amount to avoid spammers and a maximum amount to avoid a large zappers taking over the poll. Use the same amount in both fields to make sure every vote is valued the same amount. Leave it empty to accept any amount.
Failed to assemble NIP-11 url for %1$s: %2$s
Supporting clients will split and forward zaps to the users added here instead of yours
User %1$s does not have a lightning address set up to receive sats
The signer app could not be found. Check if the app hasn\'t been uninstalled
Make sure the signer application has authorized this transaction
No Wallets found to pay a lightning invoice (Error: %1$s). Please install a Lightning wallet to use zaps
No Wallets found to pay a lightning invoice. Please install a Lightning wallet to use zaps
Blossom apps were not found. Please install a local Blossom app to see this file
Error parsing NIP-47 connection string. Check if this is correct with your Wallet provider: %1$s. Error: %2$s
Error parsing NIP-47 connection string. Check if this is correct with your Wallet provider: %1$s.
Mint provided the following error message: %1$s
%1$s sats were sent to your wallet. (Fees: %2$s sats)
No compatible Cashu wallet found on system
Unable to fetch invoice from receiver\'s servers
Your wallet connect provider returned the following error: %1$s
Could not assemble LNUrl from Lightning Address \"%1$s\". Check the user\'s setup
The receiver\'s lightning service at %1$s is not available. It was calculated from the lightning address \"%2$s\". Error: %3$s. Check if the server is up and if the lightning address is correct
Could not resolve %1$s. Check if you are connected, if the server is up and if the lightning address %2$s is correct
Could not resolve %1$s. Check if you are connected, if the server is up and if the lightning address %2$s is correct.\n\nException was: %3$s
Error Parsing JSON from Lightning Address. Check the user\'s lightning setup
Error Parsing JSON from %1$s. Check the user\'s lightning setup
Callback URL not found in the User\'s lightning address server configuration
Callback URL not found from %1$s\'s response
Error Parsing JSON from Lightning Address\'s invoice fetch. Check the user\'s lightning setup
Error Parsing JSON from %1$s\'s invoice fetch. Check the user\'s lightning setup
Incorrect invoice amount (%1$s sats) from %2$s. It should have been %3$s
Unable to create a lightning invoice before sending the zap. The receiver\'s lightning wallet sent the following error: %1$s
Unable to create a lightning invoice. Message from %1$s: %2$s
Unable to create a lightning invoice before sending the zap. Element pr not found in the resulting JSON.
Unable to create a lightning invoice from %1$s: Element pr not found in the resulting JSON.

To receive push notifications, install any app that supports [Unified Push](https://unifiedpush.org/), such as [Ntfy](https://ntfy.sh/). After installing, select the app you want to use in the Settings.
Hi there, is this still available?
It\'s a brand new unit, in the original box
It\'s used, but there are no signs of usage
It has some superficial usage marks
It is still in acceptable and functional shape
Could not open the compressed file
Server did not provide a URL after uploading
Could not download uploaded media from the server
Could not check downloaded file after upload: %1$s
Could not prepare local file to upload: %1$s
Media is too big for NIP-95
Compression failed to return a file
Encrypt files before uploading for privacy. Some servers may not accept encrypted files on free accounts.
Many servers do not accept encrypted files on free accounts. You can retry without encryption.
Warning: Without encryption, anyone with the file link can see the content.
Select Low quality to compress your media to a smaller file with less quality, High quality to compress to a larger file with higher quality or Uncompressed to upload the media without compression.
Better quality at smaller file sizes but not all devices support H.265 playback.
Converts animated GIF to MP4 video for smaller file size and better playback compatibility.
Attempts to strip private metadata from supported media files before uploading
This file format does not support metadata stripping. Private information such as location and device info may be included. Upload anyway?
Failed to strip private metadata from media. Upload cancelled.
Set up a Nostr Wallet Connect (NWC) connection in your zap settings to use the wallet.
This will remove the wallet connection. You can always add it back later.
Connect one or more NWC wallets to send and receive payments.
A brief description of your article\u2026
Open all reactions to this post
Close all reactions to this post
Drag to reorder. Toggle to add or remove an item from the bottom bar. With zero items the bottom bar is hidden.
Configure which reaction buttons are shown, their order, and whether to display counters.
React to this note with an emoji
Send a lightning payment to the author
Send a payment to the author via their payment targets
Choose which buttons appear on the video player and which live in the overflow menu. Drag to reorder.
Open the video in a fullscreen zoom view
Pick a resolution for HLS videos (hidden on non-HLS videos)
Download the video to your device (hidden on live streams)
Play the video in a floating window (hidden if unsupported)
Post will be hidden by clients after this date (NIP-40)
Show npub as a QR code
Show nprofile as a QR code
Amethyst received a URI to open but that uri was invalid: %1$s
Set up your Private Inbox relays
This setting lets everybody know which relays to use when sending messages to you. Without them you might miss some messages.

Good options are:
 - inbox.nostr.wine (paid)
 - auth.nostr1.com (free)
 - you.nostr1.com (personal relays - paid)

Good options are:
 - auth.nostr1.com (free)
 - inbox.nostr.wine (paid)
 - relay.0xchat.com (free)
Insert between 1–3 relays to serve as your private inbox. DM Inbox relays should accept any message from anyone, but only allow you to download them.
DM inbox relays not found. Messages cannot be delivered until they configure their relay list.
Creating a relay list specifically designed for search and user tagging will improve these results.
Insert between 1–3 relays to use when searching for content or tagging users. Make sure your chosen relays implement NIP-50

Good options are:
 - nostr.wine
 - relay.nostr.band
 - relay.noswhere.com
Set up your Public Outbox relays to post
Creating a relay list specifically designed to receive your content is crucial for your Nostr experience and the only way your followers can find you.
Insert between 1–3 relays that receive your posts. Make sure they don\'t require payment if you are not paying to insert

Good options are:
 - nos.lol
 - nostr.mom
 - nostr.bitcoiner.social
Set up your Public Inbox relays to receive notifications
Creating a relay list specifically designed to receive notifications is crucial for your Nostr experience.

Insert between 1–3 relays that receive notifications for you. Make sure they don\'t require payment or web of trust from the sender otherwise you will only receive notifications from payers or long-term users

Good options are:
 - nos.lol
 - nostr.mom
 - nostr.bitcoiner.social
User is posting his content to these relays

This relay type stores all your content. Amethyst will send your posts here and others will use these relays to find your content. Insert between 1–3 relays. They can be personal relays, paid relays or public relays.
User is receiving notifications on these relays

This relay type receives all replies, comments, likes and zaps to your posts. They can be paid or free relays. Limits set by the relay operator can limit the notifications you receive for the good and for the bad. For example, if you are being attacked by comment spam, paid relays can filter the spam out. Insert between 1–3 relays.
User receives DMs on these relays

Insert between 1–3 relays to serve as your private inbox. Others will use these relays to send DMs to you. DM Inbox relays should accept any message from anyone, but only allow you to download them. Good options are:
 - inbox.nostr.wine (paid)
 - auth.nostr1.com (free)
 - you.nostr1.com (personal relays - paid)

Relays where your MLS KeyPackages are published (MIP-00). Other users fetch these KeyPackages to invite you into Marmot group chats. Insert between 1–3 relays that accept KeyPackage events from you and allow public reads.

Insert between 1–3 relays to store events no one else can see, like your Drafts and/or app settings. Ideally, these relays are either local or require authentication before downloading each user\'s content.
Amethyst uses these relays to download posts for you.
Current list of relays being used
Add the following relays to your General Relays list in order to receive posts from the listed users.
List of relays to use when searching content or users. Tagging and search will not work if no options are available. Make sure they implement NIP-50.
List of relays that are running in this device.
Send all received profile (kind 0) events to your local relay
Relays you trust to not need a Tor connection for
Relays you frequently go to see their Global feed
Aggregator relays the app must use to download your feeds from, like filter.nostr.wine. This replaces the outbox model and will make the app connect to only the relays in your lists.
Relays that specialize in pushing your notes to all of the other relays, like sendit.nosflare.com. Amethyst will add this relay to all new events made by you
Relays that specialize in hosting everyone\'s metadata and relay lists, like purplepag.es. Amethyst will use these relays to find users that are not in your lists.
Amethyst will never connect to these relays
Your donation helps us make a difference. Every sat counts!
This version was brought to you by:
There\'s proof this post was signed sometime before %1$s. The proof was stamped in the Bitcoin blockchain at that date and time.
Sealed message off. Click to turn on sealed message
Sealed message on. Click to turn off sealed message
Navigate to the third-party wallet provider Alby
It\'s not possible to reply a draft note
It\'s not possible to quote a draft note
It\'s not possible to react a draft note
It\'s not possible to zap a draft note
Job Requested, waiting for a reply
Payment request sent, waiting for confirmation from your wallet
Waiting for DVM to confirm payment or send results
Bad Request - The server can’t or won’t process the request.
Unauthorized - The user doesn’t have valid authentication credentials
Payment Required - The server requires payment to complete the request
Forbidden - The user doesn’t have access rights to make the request
Not Found - The server can’t find the requested address
Method Not Allowed - The server supports the request method, but not the target resource
Not Acceptable - The server doesn’t find any content that satisfies the request.
Proxy Authentication Required - The user doesn’t have valid authentication credentials
Request Timeout - The server timed out waiting for somebody else
Conflict - The server can’t fulfill the request because there’s a conflict with the resource
Gone - The content requested has been permanently deleted from the server and will not be reinstated
Length Required - The server rejects the request because it requires a defined
Precondition Failed - The request\'s preconditions in the header fields that the server fails to meet
Payload Too Large - The request is larger than the server’s defined limits, and the server refuses to process it
URI Too Long - The url requested by the client is too long for the server to process.
Unsupported Media Type - The request uses a media format the server does not support
Range Not Satisfiable - The server can’t fulfill the value indicated in the request’s Range header field.
Expectation Failed - The server can’t meet the requirements indicated by the Expect request header field
Upgrade Required - The server refuses to process the request using the current protocol unless the client upgrades to a different protocol.
Internal Server Error - The server has encountered an unexpected error and cannot complete the request
Not Implemented - The server can’t fulfill the request or doesn’t recognize the request method
Bad Gateway - The server acts as a gateway and got an invalid response from the host
Service Unavailable - This often occurs when a server is overloaded or down for maintenance
Gateway Timeout - The server was acting as a gateway or proxy and timed out, waiting for a response
HTTP Version Not Supported - The server doesn’t support the HTTP version in the request
Variant Also Negotiates - The server has an internal configuration error
Insufficient Storage - The server doesn’t have enough storage to process the request successfully
Loop Detected - The server detects an infinite loop while processing the request
Network Authentication Required - The client must be authenticated to access the network
Add as many servers as you want. You can choose which one to use later when uploading your picture
Add as many servers as you want. You can choose which one to use later when uploading your picture
Are you sure you want to delete all drafts?
No torrent apps installed to open and download the file.
Event doesn\'t have enough information to build a magnet link
Select an option to filter the feed
Feed algorithms you starred here appear as filter chips on the Home feed. Open Discover to add more.
No favorite feed algorithms yet. Open Discover, tap one, and star it to add it here.
Asking your favorite feed algorithms for feeds…
The feed algorithm returned an error
The relay that all users of this chat connect to
Unable to share image, please try again later…
Unable to share video, please try again later…
Languages shown here will not be translated. Select a language to remove it and have it translated again.
Choose the language to translate content into.
For each translated language pair, choose which language to show first.
No language display preferences yet. These are created automatically when translations occur, or you can add them manually.
Would you like to send the recent crash report to Amethyst in a DM? No personal information will be shared
This message will disappear in %1$d days
Follow lists metadata can be seen by anyone on Nostr. Only your private members are encrypted.
Follow pack metadata can be seen by anyone on Nostr and is frequently published in many websites as startup kits for new users.
This game may have ended or is waiting for opponent.
Start with a great feed by following the same people as someone you trust.
Supports npub, nprofile, NIP-05, hex, and Namecoin (.bit)
"Enter the profile of a friend or community leader. You can use their npub, NIP-05 address, or a Namecoin name like alice@example.bit or id/alice for blockchain-verified identities."
The server %1$s presented a certificate not yet in your trust store. Verify the fingerprint below matches what the server operator published, then choose whether to trust it for future connections.
Re-publish your events across all known relays to keep your outbox, inbox, and DM relays up to date. Requires Wi-Fi — this may use a lot of data.
This tool scans every relay your app has seen and redistributes your events to the correct destinations:
Download all events you authored and send them to your outbox relays.
Download all events that mention you and send them to your inbox relays.
Download all direct messages addressed to you and send them to your DM relays.
⚠ You appear to be on a metered or mobile connection. This operation can transfer a very large amount of data. Connect to Wi-Fi before starting.
Events redistributed: %1$d new out of %2$d sent and %3$d received
Completed %1$d of %2$d relays — %3$d events redistributed so far. Tap Resume to continue.
Forwarded %1$d events to destination relays out of %2$d received.
%1$d events accepted as new by destination relays.
Publish multi-resolution HLS to your media server
Your video will be transcoded into multiple resolutions so viewers get smooth playback on any connection.
H.265 not available on this device — falling back to H.264.
Your HD video is live on Nostr.
Open the note composer pre-filled with the title, description and video link so you can tweak it before posting.
No web bookmarks yet. Tap + to add one.
Request relays to permanently delete all your data up to the selected date. This action is based on NIP-62 and is legally binding in some jurisdictions.
This will request ALL relays to delete everything associated with your key up to the selected date. This event will be broadcast as widely as possible. This action cannot be undone.
All your events created before this date will be requested for deletion from the selected relay.
Reason or legal notice for the relay operator
You are about to request %1$s to permanently delete all your data created before the selected date. This cannot be undone.
You are about to request EVERY relay to permanently delete all your data created before the selected date. This will be broadcast everywhere and cannot be undone.
These are your past Request to Vanish events found on connected relays. Relays tagged in these events should not hold any of your data from before the event date.
You haven\'t sent any Request to Vanish events yet.
This request targets all relays. Use the Request to Vanish screen to test specific relays for compliance.
Unable to connect to relay management
Uses an on-device AI model to propose text corrections and tone changes.
Only letters, numbers, hyphens, and underscores
Pick a square image to represent this emoji pack.
You don\'t have any emoji packs yet
Emoji packs you\'ve added to your selection (NIP-51 kind 10030)
You haven\'t added any emoji packs to your list yet
Long-press an emoji to remove it
\"%1$s\" is not in your emoji list
Public emojis are visible to everyone and appear in your reaction menu and \":\" autocomplete picker when this pack is in your emoji list.
Private emojis are stored encrypted on relays and visible only to you. They appear in your reaction menu and \":\" autocomplete just like public ones.
